# Citations — Intermediate P1 Ch 13: Amalgamation of Companies

Every standard/rule cited in the notes, question bank and flashcards for this
chapter, with the primary-source basis a reviewer should spot-check. AS 14 is
notified subordinate legislation (Companies (Accounting Standards) Rules 2021,
under s.133 Companies Act 2013), so its operative wording is citable; positions
below are stated in original words except one marked quotation. Primary
sources: AS 14 "Accounting for Amalgamations" as notified, and the ICAI SM
Ch 13 (May 2026 ed.) for solution conventions.

Law as on: 2026-02-28 · Applicable attempts: Sept 2026, Jan 2027
Reviewer: ☐ initials/date per row once spot-checked against the notified AS.

| Ref | Position relied on | Used in |
|---|---|---|
| AS 14 para 3(e)(i)–(v) | Five cumulative conditions for amalgamation in the nature of merger; failing any one → nature of purchase | notes §2; q-005, q-006, q-018, q-028; cs-002-a; d-001, d-002; am-1, am-2 |
| AS 14 para 3(e)(ii) | 90% test is on FACE VALUE of equity shares, excluding shares already held by the transferee/its subsidiaries/nominees | notes §2 callout; q-006; d-001 |
| AS 14 para 3(e)(iii) | Consideration wholly equity shares; cash only for fractional entitlements | notes §2; q-005, q-028; cs-002-a; d-001 |
| AS 14 para 3(g) | Purchase consideration = aggregate of shares/securities issued + cash/other assets paid to SHAREHOLDERS of the transferor; excludes debenture holders, creditors, expense reimbursements | notes §3; q-001, q-002, q-023; cs-001-a; cs-003-d; cs-004-d; d-003; am-3 |
| AS 14 — pooling of interests method | Carrying amounts (policy-uniformity adjustments only); reserves preserved with identity; capital-issued vs capital-cancelled difference adjusted in reserves. **⚠ Cited generically — exact para numbers (explanation ~10–11, standard ~33–35) to be confirmed and inserted by reviewer** | notes §4, WE 3; q-010, q-022, q-027; cs-002-b/c/d/e; d-004; am-5 |
| AS 14 — purchase method | Carrying amounts or fair-value allocation; non-statutory reserves of transferor not recorded; PC vs net assets → goodwill/capital reserve. **⚠ Same para-numbering caveat** | notes §4, WE 2; q-007, q-008, q-011; cs-001-b/c/e; d-005; am-6, am-8 |
| AS 14 — goodwill on amalgamation | Amortise over a period "not exceeding five years unless a somewhat longer period can be justified" — retained as a MARKED QUOTATION of the notified standard (sole surviving 10-word shingle in the overlap check, intentional). **⚠ Para number (expl. ~19 / standard ~42) to be confirmed** | notes §4; q-009, q-021; d-005; am-7 |
| AS 14 — statutory reserves | Retain identity while the statute requires; entry: Amalgamation Adjustment Reserve Dr → To Statutory Reserve; reversal at period end | notes §5; q-011, q-012, q-024; cs-001-d; d-006; am-9 |
| MCA amendment 2016 (Companies (Accounting Standards) Amendment Rules, 2016) | "Amalgamation Adjustment Account" renamed "Amalgamation Adjustment Reserve"; presented as separate line item within reserves, not set off. **⚠ Verify notification date (believed 30-03-2016) before citing it in prose** | notes §5 callout; q-012; d-006; am-10 |
| Schedule III (Companies Act 2013) | Post-amalgamation presentation; AAR as negative reserves line | notes §5; d-006 |
| SM Ch 13 — scope | Amalgamation vs absorption vs external reconstruction; internal reconstruction boundary (Ch 14); Ind AS 103 out of syllabus scope | notes §1; q-015; d-009; am-15 |
| SM Ch 13 — consideration methods | Lump sum / net payment / net assets (agreed values, book where none agreed) / intrinsic value–share exchange | notes §3, WE 1; q-003, q-004, q-019, q-025; cs-004 set; d-003; am-4 |
| SM Ch 13 — transferor's books | Realisation A/c mechanics; balance to Equity Shareholders A/c; liabilities not taken over; liquidation-expense treatment both ways | notes §6; q-016, q-017, q-020; cs-003 set; d-007; am-11, am-12 |
| SM Ch 13 — transferee's books | Business Purchase / Liquidator entries; mutual owings (Trade Payables Dr → To Trade Receivables, after acquisition entries); unrealised profit in stock reduced to group cost against goodwill/capital reserve (purchase) or reserves (merger) | notes §7; q-013, q-014, q-026; d-008; am-13, am-14 |

## Numerical conventions used (not statutory citations)

- MCQ/worked-example arithmetic verified by
  `scripts/verify_numerical/verify_amalgamation-of-companies.py` (28/28 pass,
  this session); blind consistency pass 46/46 agreed (0 mismatches).
- Shares issued as consideration are valued at ISSUE price (agreed/intrinsic
  value), not face value — the SM's uniform solution convention.
- Net assets method uses agreed values where agreed and book values otherwise,
  per the SM's statement of AS 14; liabilities deducted are OUTSIDE liabilities
  assumed only.
- Intrinsic-value exchange (cs-004) prices the transferor exactly at its net
  asset value — noted in the explanation as a self-check, not a rule.
- Unrealised-profit fraction: mark-up on cost m ⇒ m/(100+m) of invoice value.
